pair = \abz. z a b
= \\\ 1 3 2
= 0000000101101110110

succ = \nfx. f(n f x)
= \\\ 2(3 2 1)
= 000000011100101111011010

mult = \nmfx. n(mf)x
=\\\\4(3 2)1
=0000000001011111001111011010

pred = \n. (n inclist zlist) \ab.a
= \ (1 inclist zlist) \\2
= 00 01 01 01 10 inclist zlist 0000110
= 00010101100000010110011100000100000011100101011111000001011010000101100000100000100000110

neqz = \xab.x((\qr.q)a)b
= \\\3((\\2)2)1
= 0000000101111001000011011010

Y = \f. (\x. f (x x)) (\x. f(x x)) thanks curry :3
= \(\ 2 (1 1)) (\ 2 (1 1))
000100011100110100001110011010

fact = 
= \\ neqz 1
    [  mult 1 (2(pred 1))  ]ujkkj
    [  one  ]
= 0000 010101 0000000101111001000011011010 10
    0101 0000000001011111001111011010 10 01 110 01 00010101100000010110011100000100000011100101011111000001011010000101100000100000100000110 10
    00000111010
= 0000000101111000000001011111100101010111111000000101100111000001000000111001010111110000010110100001011000001000001000001101101010

fib = 
= \\ (\ neqz (1 2) ((3 (1 2)) succ (3 (1 (1 2))))) (one) pred
= 000001000101010000000101111001000011011010011011001010111100110110000000011100101111011010011110011001101100000011101000010101100000010110011100000100000011100101011111000001011010000101100000100000100000110

----
used for other stuff
----

inclist
\pz. z (p \ab.b) (succ (p \ab.b))
\\ 1 (2 \\1) (succ (2 \\1))
0000010110011100000100100000001110010111101101001110000010
0000010110011100000100000011100101011111000001011010

zlist
\z. z (\ab.b) (\ab.b)
00010110000010000010
